---
title: "Mass Spectrometry-Based Single-Cell Proteomics Data Analysis"
author: "Zhicheng Yang"
date: "2025-07-15"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    code_folding: hide
fontsize: 18pt
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.height = 6,
  fig.width = 8,render = F
)
setwd(".")
source("../../20240703function_combine.R")
library(Seurat)
library(scp)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(data.table)
library(QFeatures)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
group_valuess = wheel("steelblue", num = 4)
```


```{r function}
calculate_miscleavage_per_sample <- function(expr_matrix) {
  library(ggplot2)
  library(reshape2)
  pep_miscleava_num_calc<-function(input="AAAKDSADKR"){
    K_num=length(strsplit(input, '')[[1]][strsplit(input, '')[[1]]=="K"])
    R_num=length(strsplit(input, '')[[1]][strsplit(input, '')[[1]]=="R"])
    
    if( strsplit(input, '')[[1]][length(strsplit(input, '')[[1]])] == "K"|strsplit(input, '')[[1]][length(strsplit(input, '')[[1]])] == "R"){
      Miscleavage=K_num+R_num-1
    } else{
      Miscleavage=K_num+R_num
    }
    if(Miscleavage==0){
      Miscleavage=0
    }else if(Miscleavage>0){
      Miscleavage=1
    }
    return(Miscleavage)
  }
  peptides <- rownames(expr_matrix)
  
  miscleavage_vec <- sapply(peptides, pep_miscleava_num_calc)
  
  result_list <- lapply(colnames(expr_matrix), function(sample) {
    sample_expr <- expr_matrix[, sample]
    detected_idx <- which(!is.na(sample_expr))
    detected_mc <- miscleavage_vec[detected_idx]
    tbl <- table(factor(detected_mc, levels = 0:max(miscleavage_vec)))
    df <- data.frame(
      Sample = sample,
      Miscleavage = as.numeric(names(tbl)),
      Count = as.numeric(tbl)
    )
    df$Fraction <- df$Count / sum(df$Count)
    return(df)
  })
  
  result_df <- do.call(rbind, result_list)
  
  return(result_df)
}

calc_correlations <- function(expr, target, method = "pearson") {
  #expr=data_pro_enzymetime_high;target = "cRAP-P00761"; method = "pearson"
  expr <- as.data.frame(expr, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  features <- expr[[1]]
  mat <- expr[,-1, drop = FALSE]
  
  mat[] <- lapply(mat, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  rownames(mat) <- features
  
  if (!(target %in% rownames(mat))) {
    stop("Target feature not found in the expression matrix.")
  }
  
  target_vec <- as.numeric(mat[target, ])
  
  safe_cor <- function(x, y, method) {
    if (all(is.na(x)) || all(is.na(y))) return(NA)
    suppressWarnings(cor(x, y, method = method, use ="pairwise.complete.obs"))
  }
  
  cors <- sapply(rownames(mat), function(f) {
    safe_cor(target_vec, as.numeric(mat[f, ]), method = method)
  })
  
  result <- data.frame(cors,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  result$Feature <- rownames(result)
   result[,2]<-sub("\\.","-", result[,2])
  
  return(result)
}
calc_correlations <- function(expr, target, method = "pearson",na_threshold = 0.5) {
  expr <- as.data.frame(expr, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  features <- expr[[1]]
  mat <- expr[,-1, drop = FALSE]
  
  mat[] <- lapply(mat, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  rownames(mat) <- features
  
  keep <- rowMeans(is.na(mat)) <= na_threshold
  mat <- mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  
  if (!(target %in% rownames(mat))) {
    stop("Target feature not found in the expression matrix (it may have been filtered out).")
  }
  
  target_vec <- as.numeric(mat[target, ])
  
  safe_cor <- function(x, y, method) {
    if (all(is.na(x)) || all(is.na(y))) return(NA)
    suppressWarnings(cor(x, y, method = method, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))
  }
  
  cors <- sapply(rownames(mat), function(f) {
    safe_cor(target_vec, as.numeric(mat[f, ]), method = method)
  })
  result <- data.frame(cors,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  result$Feature <- rownames(result)
   result[,2]<-sub("\\.","-", result[,2])
  
  
  return(result)
}

# calc_correlations(expr_matrix, target = "TP53", method = "pearson")



```


```{r Misc analysis}
data_pep_enzymetime<-read.delim("./Figure4_data/20250826_111054_20250718_Report_pep.tsv")
data_pep_enzymetime[data_pep_enzymetime=="NaN"]<-NA
rownames(data_pep_enzymetime)<-data_pep_enzymetime$PEP.GroupingKey
data_pep_enzymetime$PEP.GroupingKey<-NULL
df_miss_enzymetime<-calculate_miscleavage_per_sample(data_pep_enzymetime) %>% filter(Miscleavage %in% 1)
df_miss_enzymetime$Group1<-unname(sapply(df_miss_enzymetime$Sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][4]))
df_miss_enzymetime$Group1<-factor(df_miss_enzymetime$Group1, levels=c("low","high"))
df_miss_enzymetime$Group2<-unname(sapply(df_miss_enzymetime$Sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][5]))
df_miss_enzymetime$Group2<-factor(df_miss_enzymetime$Group2, levels=c("5min","15min","30min","60min","120min"))
sum_dat <- df_miss_enzymetime %>%
  group_by(Group1, Group2) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Fraction, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd   = sd(Fraction,   na.rm = TRUE),
            n    = sum(!is.na(Fraction)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(fill_group = paste(Group1, Group2))

dig_time_mis_compare<-ggplot(sum_dat, aes(x=Group2, y=mean*100,fill=Group1)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), width=0.7,alpha=0.8,) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=(mean-sd)*100, ymax=(mean+sd)*100), width=0.2, position=position_dodge(0.7),alpha=0.8,) +
  geom_text(data = sum_dat, aes(x = Group2, y = mean*100, label = scales::comma(round(mean*100,4)), group = Group1),
            position = position_dodge(0.7),color = "white",
            fontface = "bold", size = 4, vjust = 5)+
  geom_point(data = df_miss_enzymetime, aes(x = Group2, y = Fraction*100, group = Group1),
             position =  position_dodge(0.7), shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.2,
             fill = "white", color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess,guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  labs(x="Digestion Time", y="Percentage of Missed Cleavages (%)", fill="Group")+
  theme_yzc
pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure4B_dig_time_mis_compare.pdf", width=10, height=7)
dig_time_mis_compare
dev.off()

```

```{r K-M cruve}
# install.packages(c("ggplot2", "patchwork"))

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)


Km   <- 1
Vmax <- 1

S_curve <- seq(0, 5, length.out = 200)
v_curve <- Vmax * S_curve / (Km + S_curve)

df_curve <- data.frame(S = S_curve, v = v_curve)

S_points <- c(0.3, 1, 3)
v_points <- Vmax * S_points / (Km + S_points)

df_points <- data.frame(
  S_level = factor(c("Low [S]", "Medium [S]", "High [S]"),
                   levels = c("Low [S]", "Medium [S]", "High [S]")),
  S = S_points,
  v = v_points
)

pA <- ggplot() +
  geom_line(
    data = df_curve,
    aes(x = S, y = v),
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_points,
    aes(x = S, y = v),
    size = 2
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = df_points,
    aes(x = S, xend = S, y = 0, yend = v),
    linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Substrate concentration (low \u2192 high)",
    y = "Relative reaction rate (v / Vmax)",
    title = "a"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 5), ylim = c(0, 1.05)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "bold", vjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.4),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )


df_bar <- df_points

pB <- ggplot(df_bar, aes(x = S_level, y = v)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = "higher rate"),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 2.5
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Substrate condition",
    y = "Relative reaction rate (v / Vmax)",
    title = "b"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.2)) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "bold", vjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.4),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )


p_figure <- pA / pB + 
  plot_annotation(title = "Supplementary Figure S1. Conceptual illustration of enzyme kinetics\nunder constant enzyme concentration")

p_figure

# ggsave("Supp_Fig_S1_enzyme_kinetics_conceptual.png", p_figure,
#        width = 85, height = 120, units = "mm", dpi = 600)





```



```{r Identity Intensity}
data_enzymetime_pro<-read.delim("./Figure4_data/20250826_111054_20250718_Report_pro.tsv")
data_enzymetime_pep<-read.delim("./Figure4_data/20250826_111054_20250718_Report_pep.tsv")
data_enzymetime_pro_iden<-spectronaut_to_iden(data_enzymetime_pro)

data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group1<-unname(sapply(data_enzymetime_pro_iden$sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][4]))
data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group1<-factor(data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group1, levels=c("low","high"))
data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group2<-unname(sapply(data_enzymetime_pro_iden$sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][5]))
data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group2<-factor(data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group2, levels=c("5min","15min","30min","60min","120min"))

data_enzymetime_pep_iden<-spectronaut_to_iden(data_enzymetime_pep)
data_enzymetime_pep_iden$Group1<-unname(sapply(data_enzymetime_pep_iden$sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][4]))
data_enzymetime_pep_iden$Group1<-factor(data_enzymetime_pep_iden$Group1, levels=c("low","high"))
data_enzymetime_pep_iden$Group2<-unname(sapply(data_enzymetime_pep_iden$sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][5]))
data_enzymetime_pep_iden$Group2<-factor(data_enzymetime_pep_iden$Group2, levels=c("5min","15min","30min","60min","120min"))



sum_dat_pro <- data_enzymetime_pro_iden %>%
  group_by(Group1, Group2) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(p_num, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd   = sd(p_num,   na.rm = TRUE),
            n    = sum(!is.na(p_num)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(fill_group = paste(Group1, Group2))
sum_dat_pep <- data_enzymetime_pep_iden %>%
  group_by(Group1, Group2) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(p_num, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd   = sd(p_num,   na.rm = TRUE),
            n    = sum(!is.na(p_num)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(fill_group = paste(Group1, Group2))


iden_time_pro_compare<-ggplot(sum_dat_pro, aes(x=Group2, y=mean,fill=Group1)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), width=0.7,alpha=0.8) +

  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=(mean-sd), ymax=(mean+sd)), width=0.2, position=position_dodge(0.7),alpha=0.8,) +
  geom_text(data = sum_dat_pro, aes(x = Group2, y = mean, label = scales::comma(round(mean,4)), group = Group1),
            position = position_dodge(0.7),color = "white",
            fontface = "bold", size = 4, vjust = 5)+
  geom_point(data = data_enzymetime_pro_iden, aes(x = Group2, y = p_num, group = Group1),
             position =  position_dodge(0.7), shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.2,
             fill = "white", color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess,guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  labs(x=NULL, y="Protein Groups", fill="Group")+
  theme_yzc+theme(legend.position = "none")
iden_time_pep_compare<-ggplot(sum_dat_pep, aes(x=Group2, y=mean,fill=Group1)) +
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), width=0.7,alpha=0.8,) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=(mean-sd), ymax=(mean+sd)), width=0.2, position=position_dodge(0.7),alpha=0.8,) +
  geom_text(data = sum_dat_pep, aes(x = Group2, y = mean, label = scales::comma(round(mean,4)), group = Group1),
            position = position_dodge(0.7),color = "white",
            fontface = "bold", size = 4, vjust = 5)+
  geom_point(data = data_enzymetime_pep_iden, aes(x = Group2, y = p_num, group = Group1),
             position =  position_dodge(0.7), shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.2,
             fill = "white", color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess,guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  labs(x="Digestion Time", y="Peptides", fill="Group")+
  theme_yzc+theme(legend.position = "bottom")
pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure4B_EnzymeTime_Pro_Pep_iden.pdf",width=10,height=7)
iden_time_pro_compare/iden_time_pep_compare
dev.off()


```


```{r Trypsin Intensity}
data_pro_enzymetime<-read.delim("./Figure4_data/20250826_111054_20250718_Report_pro.tsv")
data_pro_enzymetime[data_pro_enzymetime=="NaN"]<-NA

#Trypsin is cRAP-P00761
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin <- data_pro_enzymetime %>%
  select(PG.ProteinGroups, matches("\\.PG\\.Quantity")) %>%
  filter(grepl("cRAP-P00761", PG.ProteinGroups)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("\\.PG\\.Quantity"),
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Quantity"
  )
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Log10Quantity<-log10(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Quantity+1)
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group1<-unname(sapply(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][4]))
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group1<-factor(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group1, levels=c("low","high"))

data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group2<-unname(sapply(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][5]))
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group2<-factor(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group2, levels=c("5min","15min","30min","60min","120min"))

sum_dat_trypsin <- data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin %>%
  group_by(Group1, Group2) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Log10Quantity, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd   = sd(Log10Quantity,   na.rm = TRUE),
            n    = sum(!is.na(Log10Quantity)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(fill_group = paste(Group1, Group2))


tyrpsin_inten_compare_plot<-ggplot(sum_dat_trypsin, aes(x=Group2, y=mean,fill=Group1)) +
  geom_point(sum_dat_trypsin, mapping=aes(x=Group2, y=mean, group=Group1,fill=Group1,color=Group1), position="identity", shape=21, size=4, stroke=0.2,
            alpha=0.8)+
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=(mean-sd), ymax=(mean+sd),color=Group1), width=0.2, position="identity") +
  geom_line(aes(x=Group2, y=mean, group=Group1,color=Group1), position="identity", size=0.8) +
  geom_point(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin, mapping=aes(x=Group2, y=Log10Quantity, group=Group1), position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=0.1, dodge.width=0.2), shape=21, size=2, stroke=0.2,
             alpha=0.8)+
    scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  scale_color_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  ylim(4.5,6.5)+
  labs(x="Digestion Time", y="Log10 Intensity of Trypsin", fill="Group")+
  # theme_yzc+
  # 
  # 
  # geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), width=0.7) +
  # 
  # geom_text(data = sum_dat_trypsin, aes(x = Group2, y = mean*100, label = scales::comma(round(mean*100,4)), group = Group1),
  #           position = position_dodge(0.7),color = "white",
  #           fontface = "bold", size = 4, vjust = 5)+
  # geom_point(data = df_miss_enzymetime, aes(x = Group2, y = Fraction*100, group = Group1),
  #            position =  position_dodge(1), shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.2,
  #            fill = "white", color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  # #scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess,guide = "none") +
  # scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  # labs(x="Digestion Time", y="Intensity of Trypsin ", fill="Group")+
  # theme_yzc
pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure4C_dig_time_trypsin_inten_compare.pdf", width=10, height=7)
tyrpsin_inten_compare_plot
dev.off()

```

```{r Trypsin high correlation}
#data_pro_enzymetime<-read.delim("./Figure4_data/20250826_111054_20250718_Report_pro.tsv")

#Trypsin is cRAP-P00761
data_pro_enzymetime_Group<-data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin %>% select(Sample, Group1,Group2)
data_pro_enzymetime_high<-data_pro_enzymetime[,c("PG.ProteinGroups",data_pro_enzymetime_Group %>% filter(Group1=="high") %>% .[,-c(2,3), drop=T])]
data_pro_enzymetime_low<-data_pro_enzymetime[,c("PG.ProteinGroups",data_pro_enzymetime_Group %>% filter(Group1!="high") %>% .[,-c(2,3), drop=T])]

a<-calc_correlations(data_pro_enzymetime_high, target = "cRAP-P00761", method = "pearson",na_threshold = 0.5)
length(na.omit(a$Feature[a$cors > 0.8]))
b<-calc_correlations(data_pro_enzymetime_low, target = "cRAP-P00761", method = "pearson",na_threshold = 0.5)
length(na.omit(b$Feature[b$cors > 0.8]))
overlap_features <- intersect(a$Feature[a$cors > 0.8], b$Feature[b$cors > 0.8])

data_pro_enzymetime_sel<-data_pro_enzymetime %>%filter(PG.ProteinGroups %in% overlap_features)
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin <- data_pro_enzymetime %>%
  select(PG.ProteinGroups, matches("\\.PG\\.Quantity")) %>%
  filter(grepl("cRAP-P00761", PG.ProteinGroups)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("\\.PG\\.Quantity"),
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Quantity"
  )
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Log10Quantity<-log10(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Quantity+1)
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group1<-unname(sapply(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][4]))
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group1<-factor(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group1, levels=c("low","high"))

data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group2<-unname(sapply(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Sample, function(x) strsplit(x, "_")[[1]][5]))
data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group2<-factor(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin$Group2, levels=c("5min","15min","30min","60min","120min"))

sum_dat_trypsin <- data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin %>%
  group_by(Group1, Group2) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(Log10Quantity, na.rm = TRUE),
            sd   = sd(Log10Quantity,   na.rm = TRUE),
            n    = sum(!is.na(Log10Quantity)),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(fill_group = paste(Group1, Group2))


ggplot(sum_dat_trypsin, aes(x=Group2, y=mean,fill=Group1)) +
  geom_point(sum_dat_trypsin, mapping=aes(x=Group2, y=mean, group=Group1,fill=Group1,color=Group1), position="identity", shape=21, size=4, stroke=0.2,
            alpha=0.6)+
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=(mean-sd), ymax=(mean+sd),color=Group1), width=0.2, position="identity") +
  geom_line(aes(x=Group2, y=mean, group=Group1,color=Group1), position="identity", size=0.8) +
  geom_point(data_pro_enzymetime_Trypsin, mapping=aes(x=Group2, y=Log10Quantity, group=Group1), position=position_jitterdodge(jitter.width=0.1, dodge.width=0.2), shape=21, size=2, stroke=0.2,
             alpha=0.5)+
    scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  scale_color_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  ylim(4.5,6.5)+
  labs(x="Digestion Time", y="Log10 Intensity of Trypsin", fill="Group")+
  theme_yzc+


  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), width=0.7) +

  geom_text(data = sum_dat, aes(x = Group2, y = mean*100, label = scales::comma(round(mean*100,4)), group = Group1),
            position = position_dodge(0.7),color = "white",
            fontface = "bold", size = 4, vjust = 5)+
  geom_point(data = df_miss_enzymetime, aes(x = Group2, y = Fraction*100, group = Group1),
             position =  position_dodge(1), shape = 21, size = 2, stroke = 0.2,
             fill = "white", color = "black", alpha = 0.85) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess,guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=group_valuess) +
  labs(x="Digestion Time", y="Percentage of Missed Cleavages (%)", fill="Group")+
  theme_yzc
```

```{r abstrat figure}
# ===== Panel A1: Effect of substrate (enzyme fixed) =====

S <- seq(0, 5, length.out = 200)
v <- S / (1 + S)

curve_df <- data.frame(S, v)

pts_S <- c(0.5, 1.5, 3.8)
pts_v <- pts_S / (1 + pts_S)

pts_df <- data.frame(
  S = pts_S,
  v = pts_v,
  label = c("Low\nsubstrate", "Medium\nsubstrate", "High\nsubstrate")
)

pA1 <- ggplot(curve_df, aes(S, v)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, colour = "black") +
  geom_point(data = pts_df, aes(S, v), size = 2) +
  geom_segment(
    data = pts_df,
    aes(x = S, xend = S, y = 0, yend = v),
    linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  labs(
    #title = "A1",
    x = "Substrate concentration (low → high)",
    y = "Relative reaction rate\n(v / Vmax)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.05)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    axis.ticks = element_blank())+
  theme_yzc
# ===== Panel A2: Effect of enzyme (substrate fixed) =====

enzyme_df <- data.frame(
  Enzyme = factor(c("Low\nenzyme",  "High\nenzyme"),
                  levels = c("Low\nenzyme",  "High\nenzyme")),
  rate = c(0.35, 0.95)
)

pA2 <- ggplot(enzyme_df, aes(Enzyme, rate)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, fill = "grey70") +
  labs(
   # title = "A2",
    x = "Enzyme concentration (low → high)",
    y = "Relative reaction rate"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.1)) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  )+
  theme_yzc

figure_A <- pA1 | pA2

figure_A

pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure_Abstract_Enzyme_Substrate.pdf", width=7, height=5)
figure_A
dev.off()

```


```{r pca}

data_pro_enzymetime_1 <- data_enzymetime_pro %>%
  select(PG.ProteinGroups, matches("\\.PG\\.Quantity")) 
data_pro_enzymetime_1[data_pro_enzymetime_1=="NaN"]<-1
data_pro_enzymetime_impute
overview_pca(data = data_pro_enzymetime_1[,-1],group = data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group2,palette = c("black",group_valuess),label = "none")
overview_pca(data = data_pro_enzymetime_1[,-1],group = data_enzymetime_pro_iden$Group1,palette = c("black",group_valuess),label = "none")



```


```{r CV vs digestion time}

library(tidyverse)

df_long <- data_pro_enzymetime_1 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -PG.ProteinGroups,
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "intensity"
  )
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    enzyme = ifelse(str_detect(sample, "_low_"), "low", "high"),
    time = str_extract(sample, "(?<=_)(5min|15min|30min|60min|120min)(?=_)"),
    replicate = str_extract(sample, "rep\\d+")
  )
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    intensity = ifelse(intensity <= 1, NA, intensity),
   # log10_intensity = log10(intensity)
    log10_intensity =intensity
  )
df_cv <- df_long %>%
  group_by(PG.ProteinGroups, enzyme, time) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs = sum(!is.na(log10_intensity)),
    mean_logI = mean(log10_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_logI   = sd(log10_intensity, na.rm = TRUE),
    cv = sd_logI / mean_logI,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_obs >= 3, mean_logI > 0)
df_cv <- df_cv %>%
  mutate(
    time = factor(
      time,
      levels = c("5min", "15min", "30min", "60min", "120min")
    )
  )
df_cv_sum <- df_cv %>%
  group_by(enzyme, time) %>%
  summarise(
    median_cv = median(cv, na.rm = TRUE),
    q25 = quantile(cv, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75 = quantile(cv, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

library(ggplot2)
pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure4C_CV_vs_DigestionTime.pdf", width=6, height=4)
ggplot(
  df_cv_sum,
  aes(x = time, y = median_cv*100, color = enzyme, group = enzyme)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  # geom_errorbar(
  #   aes(ymin = q25, ymax = q75),
  #   width = 0.15,
  #   linewidth = 0.6
  # ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "low" = group_valuess[1],
      "high" = group_valuess[2]
    ),
    labels = c("20 ng/µL", "120 ng/µL")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Digestion time ",
    y = "Median CV(%) ",
    color = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_yzc
dev.off()


```

```{r completeness}
library(tidyverse)

df_long <- data_pro_enzymetime_1 %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -PG.ProteinGroups,
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "intensity"
  )
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    enzyme = ifelse(str_detect(sample, "_low_"), "low", "high"),
    time   = str_extract(sample, "(5min|15min|30min|60min|120min)"),
    rep    = str_extract(sample, "rep\\d+")
  )
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(
    intensity = ifelse(intensity <= 1, NA, intensity),
    log10_intensity = log10(intensity)
  )

df_detect <- df_long %>%
  group_by(PG.ProteinGroups, enzyme, time) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rep    = n_distinct(rep),
    n_detect = sum(!is.na(log10_intensity)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
df_detect <- df_detect %>%
  mutate(
    complete80 = n_detect / n_rep >= 0.75
  )
df_completeness <- df_detect %>%
  group_by(enzyme, time) %>%
  summarise(
    completeness80 = mean(complete80),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

df_completeness <- df_completeness %>%
  mutate(
    time = factor(time, levels = c("5min","15min","30min","60min","120min"))
  )

ggplot(df_completeness,
       aes(x = time, y = completeness80, color = enzyme, group = enzyme)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("low" = "#2C7FB8", "high" = "#C77CFF"),
    labels = c("20 ng/µL", "120 ng/µL")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Digestion time",
    y = "Completeness (≥80% replicates)",
    color = "Enzyme concentration"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

```




```{r cormat}


df_median <- df_long %>%
  group_by(PG.ProteinGroups, enzyme, time) %>%
  summarise(
    med_logI = mean(log10_intensity, na.rm = F),
    #n_detect = sum(!is.na(log10_intensity)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(med_logI))

df_wide <- df_median %>%
  unite(condition, enzyme, time, sep = "_") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = condition,
    values_from = med_logI
  )

mat <- df_wide %>%
  select(-PG.ProteinGroups) %>%
  as.matrix()

library(PerformanceAnalytics)
desired_order <- c(
  "low_5min", "low_15min", "low_30min", "low_60min", "low_120min",
  "high_5min", "high_15min", "high_30min", "high_60min", "high_120min"
)
pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure4D_Correlation_Matrix.pdf", width=8, height=8)
chart.Correlation(
  mat[,desired_order],
  method = "pearson",
  histogram = TRUE,
  pch = 20
)
dev.off()


```
```{r df_mat}

# df_cv_sum$fill_group<-paste(df_cv_sum$enzyme,df_cv_sum$time,sep=" ") 
# df_cv_sum<-arrange(df_cv_sum,desc(fill_group))
# sum_dat_pro<-arrange(sum_dat_pro,desc(fill_group))
# sum_dat<-arrange(sum_dat,desc(fill_group))
# df_metrics<-data.frame(Pgs=sum_dat_pro$mean,
#                        CV=df_cv_sum$median_cv*100,
#                        Miss=sum_dat$mean*100,
#                        enzyme_time=df_cv_sum$time,
#                        enzyme=df_cv_sum$enzyme)
# library(tidyverse)

df <- df_metrics %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    protein_groups = Pgs,
    median_cv = CV,
    missed_cleavage = Miss,
    time = enzyme_time
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    time_min = as.numeric(str_remove(time, "min")),
    enzyme_ng = ifelse(enzyme == "high", 120, 20)
  )
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    s_protein = (protein_groups - min(protein_groups)) /
                (max(protein_groups) - min(protein_groups))
  )
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    s_missed = (max(missed_cleavage) - missed_cleavage) /
               (max(missed_cleavage) - min(missed_cleavage)),

    s_cv = (max(median_cv) - median_cv) /
           (max(median_cv) - min(median_cv)),

    s_time = (max(time_min) - time_min) /
             (max(time_min) - min(time_min)),

    s_enzyme = (max(enzyme_ng) - enzyme_ng) /
               (max(enzyme_ng) - min(enzyme_ng))
  )
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    total_score =
      0.35 * s_protein +
      0.30 * s_missed +
      0.05 * s_cv +
      0.25 * s_time +
      0.05 * s_enzyme
  )





df_stack <- df %>%
  mutate(
    contrib_protein = 0.50 * s_protein,
    contrib_missed  = 0.20 * s_missed,
    contrib_cv      = 0.05 * s_cv,
    contrib_time    = 0.20 * s_time,
    contrib_enzyme  = 0.05 * s_enzyme
  )
df_stack_long <- df_stack %>%
  select(time, enzyme, starts_with("contrib_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("contrib_"),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "contribution"
  )
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  df_stack_long,
  aes(x = paste(time, enzyme), y = contribution, fill = metric)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "contrib_protein" = "#4575b4",
      "contrib_missed"  = "#fdae61",
      "contrib_cv"      = "#91bfdb",
      "contrib_time"    = "#66c2a5",
      "contrib_enzyme"  = "#e6f598"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "Protein ID",
      "Missed cleavage",
      "CV",
      "Digestion time",
      "Enzyme load"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Digestion condition",
    y = "Weighted score contribution",
    fill = "Metric"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)
df_stack_long <- df_stack_long %>%
  left_join(
    df %>% select(time, enzyme, total_score),
    by = c("time", "enzyme")
  )
df_stack_long <- df_stack_long %>%
  mutate(
    condition = paste(time, enzyme),
    condition = factor(
      condition,
      levels = df %>%
        arrange(desc(total_score)) %>%
        mutate(condition = paste(time, enzyme)) %>%
        pull(condition)
    )
  )

library(ggplot2)

p_score<-ggplot(
  df_stack_long,
  aes(x = condition, y = contribution, fill = metric)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
scale_fill_manual(
  values = c(
    "contrib_protein" = "#4682B4",
    "contrib_missed"  = "#4BB446",
    "contrib_time"    = "#B47846",
    "contrib_enzyme"  = "#AF46B4",
    "contrib_cv"      = "#B0B0B0"
  )
  # labels = c(
  #   "Protein identification",
  #   "Missed cleavage",
  #   "Digestion time",
  #   "Enzyme consumption",
  #   "Quantitative CV"
  # )
)+

  theme_yzc+theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      vjust = 1
    ),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure4E_Digestion_Condition_Score_Stacked_Barplot.pdf", width=7, height=5)
print(p_score)
dev.off()

```


```{r df_weight}

df_weight <- tibble(
  metric = c("Protein identification",
             "Missed cleavage",
             "Digestion time",
             "Quantitative CV",
             "Enzyme consumption"),
  weight = c(0.50, 0.20, 0.20, 0.05, 0.05)
)
p_weight<-ggplot(df_weight, aes(x = metric, y = weight, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    y = "Weight",
    x = NULL,
    title = "Relative importance of evaluation metrics"
  ) +theme_yzc+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

pdf("./Figure4_plot/Figure4E_Digestion_Condition_Score_Weight_Barplot.pdf", width=5, height=4)
print(p_weight)
dev.off()
```
